name: DeltaPress
changes: Login page customization with logos and backgrounds
Custom header HTML and scripts support
Custom branding settings with site name and tagline
Site logo upload and URL configuration
Login page background color and image support
Header and footer scripts (analytics, tracking codes)
Primary, secondary, and accent color configuration
Custom CSS editor with live preview
Branding API endpoints (GET, PUT, POST, RESET)
Logo upload API with base64 support
Database installation with PostgreSQL (default), MySQL, and MongoDB options
Automatic database table creation with schema initialization
Secure credential generation with unique passwords for app and database
Docker container support for database deployment
Rugged all-encompassing installer with progress bar
Critical step detection with automatic halt on failure
FAQ documentation covering all common issues
Comprehensive PowerShell rollout script for Windows
Docker deployment with auto-install and container management
Real-time logging with color-coded status indicators
Admin API Settings view for CORS/ENV/API visibility
API provider status dashboard with key count and cooldown status
Environment variable status with secret protection
Model configurations display in admin panel
Enhanced role permissions: Admin, Editor, Reviewer, User
CORS handling with configurable origin whitelisting
API rate limiting with per-provider configuration
Model-specific configurations for Gemini, Zhipu, AI/ML, Kimi
Automatic cooldown mechanism on rate limit errors
Enhanced retry logic with exponential backoff
